message:
fix(core): cfg-gate tokio-specific tests under asupersync-runtime feature

Guard tests that require tokio-specific features (start_paused,
time::pause, join! macro) with #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]
so they are skipped when the asupersync runtime abstraction layer
is active (which doesn't support these tokio internals).

runtime_compat.rs:
- Remove duplicate channel declarations in mpsc tests that had
  conflicting cfg branches (simplify to single `let (tx, mut rx)`)
- Gate io_async_read_ext, io_read_to_end_via_ext, join_two_futures,
  join_three_futures tests

replay.rs:
- Gate play_deterministic_timing, play_double_speed,
  play_with_pause_then_resume tests (all use time::pause())

wezterm.rs:
- Gate TestTextSource struct/impl + PaneTextSource impl + 3 waiter
  tests (waiter_matches_substring, waiter_times_out,
  waiter_stops_at_max_polls) that depend on start_paused
- Gate AtomicUsize import behind same cfg

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
